title: Washable Puppy Pads, 2 Packs Fast Absorption Reusable Puppy Pads, Dog Pee Pad, Waterproof Whelping Pads, Non-Slip Training Pads Pet Playpen Puppy Mat for Floor, Dog Crate -79x92cm
features: 【QUICK ABSORBENT & LEAKPROOF】Our reusable dog pee pads are useful for fast absorbing water spills and drool from dog bowls, also nice for potty training, protecting your floor and furniture and keep clean

【SOFT SURFACE & DURABLE】Pick for life washable pee pads are made of soft and comfortable flannel material with star pattern. The whelping pads help you protect the skin and the paws of pets at the same time

【EASY TO CLEAN & REUSABLE】Our puppy pads support machine wash or hand wash. It's as simple as washing your daily clothing. We recommend put in dryer at low temperature to keep the surface fluffy back up to its original state for longer use
【NON-SLIP BOTTOM】Our pee pads have upgrade silicone paw non-slip and waterproof backing. It has a better grip on the floor when your dogs running around

【MULTIPURPOSE MAT】Our training mats are perfect for indoor and outdoor activities. It can be used in the crate, kennel, and playpen as training or whelping pads, also used in the car or can be easily folded to take out for travel with your pet
